auth_model.note: En demo, JWT emitido por el propio fitness-api (`POST /api/auth/login`). El gateway `/fitness/` NO usa `auth_request` (similar a `/akoenet/`); la app debe enviar Bearer. Futuro: alinear JWT con platform/auth.

endpoints_demo: PATCH /fitness/api/admin/exercises/:id — actualizar videoUrl (YouTube/Vimeo u otra URL https)
POST /fitness/api/admin/exercises/:id/media — multipart campo file (video/mp4, video/webm, video/quicktime)
GET /fitness/api/media/:tenantId/:fileName — descarga vídeo tenant (JWT CLIENT/TRAINER/OWNER/STAFF mismo tenant)
